mapper.select: SELECT id, openid, nickname, avatar_url, phone, referral_code, referrer_id, recharge_balance, rebate_balance, membership_start, membership_expire, auto_subscribe, status, selected_gift_id, version, create_time, update_time FROM users WHERE openid = #{openid}

SELECT id, openid, nickname, avatar_url, phone, referral_code, referrer_id, recharge_balance, rebate_balance, membership_start, membership_expire, auto_subscribe, status, selected_gift_id, version, create_time, update_time FROM users WHERE referral_code = #{referralCode}

SELECT id, openid, nickname, avatar_url, phone, referral_code, referrer_id, recharge_balance, rebate_balance, membership_start, membership_expire, auto_subscribe, status, selected_gift_id, version, create_time, update_time FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone}
